trading_decision.rationale: Positions refresh: HD only (1.306sh @382.91, mv 502.93 +2.93 flat ~20% equity), no AMD fill from prev order (likely day TIF expired end-session). Account equity 2502.93, BP 4502.93, cash 2000. Market rebound confirmed (SPY+0.68%, QQQ+1.01%, IWM+1.09%, DIA+0.77%). HD strong +2.17% 385.16 (intraday low 382.23>382 no invalid, post-earnings hold). AMD +8.72% 213.75 (high vol 69M, open 211.66>206 invalid no break low 206.51). Meta AI chips deal validated (multi-year 6GW, similar OpenAI/NVDA), outperforms semis SMH+1.58%>IWM/XLF. Scans refresh: XLE-0.39% lag no leaders (FANG weak EPS), IWM/XLF modest no specific outperformers vs AMD catalyst (news vague). Tariffs/AI jitters backdrop but rebound intact, semis lead. Bootstrap: HD cyclical + AMD tech/semis diversifies, progressive 500 notional ~2.3sh ~10% equity, <30% tech. Cadence 500/run maintains discipline vs vol.
trading_decision.signal_principal: Meta AI chips deal +8.7% surge, SMH outperf in rebound.
trading_decision.risk_identified: Tariffs escalation/AI uncertainty vol, tech concentration if semis fade, no fill prev order.
trading_decision.invalidation_condition: Close below today low 206.5 or momentum loss <211 open.
